rationale: Conservative policy with 0.5 SoC threshold blocks sharing when requester is at 0.41 and your own SoC is declining; no reconnection/load reduction confirmed within required 4-tick window, so self-preservation mode takes precedence.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
